reference_image.critical_note: The reference image IS the progress bar. Match its style and frame exactly.

empty.description: Empty (0% filled) state: the outer frame with no fill inside.

full.description: Fully filled (100%) state: same outer frame, fill reaches the full width in a style matching the source art.

forbidden_content: stripping or altering any backgrounds, frames, or borders that are visible in the source
changes to the outer frame between states
priority_rules: DIMENSIONS MUST match the reference image exactly
Outer frame SILHOUETTE must be identical between empty and full
Fill style must match the source art style
